targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM logs.fluentbit;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS errors FROM logs.fluentbit WHERE data->>'log' IS NOT NULL AND LEFT(TRIM(data->>'log'),1)='{' AND (data->>'log')::jsonb->>'level' IN ('ERROR','CRITICAL') AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour';
SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) AS time, COUNT(*) AS count FROM logs.fluentbit WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT (data->>'log')::jsonb->>'level' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM logs.fluentbit WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND data->>'log' IS NOT NULL AND LEFT(TRIM(data->>'log'),1)='{' GROUP BY metric ORDER BY value DESC;
SELECT tag AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM logs.fluentbit WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY tag ORDER BY value DESC;

SELECT to_char(time, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS time, REPLACE(data->>'container_name','/','') AS container, (data->>'log')::jsonb->>'level' AS level, LEFT((data->>'log')::jsonb->>'message',120) AS message FROM logs.fluentbit WHERE data->>'log' IS NOT NULL AND LEFT(TRIM(data->>'log'),1)='{' AND (data->>'log')::jsonb->>'level' IN ('ERROR','CRITICAL') ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 20;
